text.autoconfig.bingobrewers.title: Bingo Brewers Config
text.autoconfig.bingobrewers.option.show: Show number of players in the splash lobby
text.autoconfig.bingobrewers.option.spla: Whether to show splash notifications outside of Skyblock AND the Prototype Lobby.
text.autoconfig.bingobrewers.option.show: Include the splasher's IGN in splash notifications
Include the bingo party listed in the splash message in splash notifications
Include the location in splash notifications
Show any extra information the splasher included in the splash notification
text.autoconfig.bingobrewers.option.maxP: Maximum number of scaled pixels for a single line before it is wrapped to another
text.autoconfig.bingobrewers.option.spla: splash HUD X offset from top-left
Set the volume of the splash notification (0-200)
text.autoconfig.bingobrewers.option.aler: Set the color of the alert text (e.g. "Splash in Hub 14")
text.autoconfig.bingobrewers.option.spla: How long the information of the current splash will stay on the top-left
How long the alert of the latest splash will appear in the center
text.autoconfig.bingobrewers.option.wayp: How to display waypoints once you have opened the chest.
text.autoconfig.bingobrewers.option.jasp: Separate toggle for all Jasper gemstones, they can reveal Fairy Grottos.
text.autoconfig.bingobrewers.option.junk: Wishing Compasses, Treasurite, Jungle Hearts, Oil Barrels, Sludge Juice, Ascension Ropes, Yoggies.
text.autoconfig.bingobrewers.option.show: Show coins per Bingo Point in the Bingo Shop.
text.autoconfig.bingobrewers.option.auto: Choose which updates the auto-updater should look for
Auto download updates when available. Requires restart.
text.autoconfig.bingobrewers.option.disp: Display the amount of missing Bingo Points to buy the item.
Display how many Bingoes are required to buy the item.
Display a message if the Chicken Head cooldown is reset.
text.autoconfig.bingobrewers.option.eggT: What to display when the Chicken cooldown is reset. (Use & for § in COLOR only codes)
text.autoconfig.bingobrewers.option.play: Play a sound if the Chicken Head cooldown is reset.
text.autoconfig.bingobrewers.option.test: Controls whenever to connect to the bingobrewers testing server
Leave this as false unless you know what you are doing
